description: Extracts metadata directly from book files (EPUB, CBZ, CBR, PDF, audiobooks) and enriches via online APIs: Hardcover, Google Books, OpenLibrary. No Calibre, Audiobookshelf, or Komga dependencies required.
name: BookEnhancers
overview: Unified ebook, audiobook, and comic metadata enrichment plugin. Parses files directly and cascades online lookups for the best available metadata.

versions.changelog: v0.8.8.0 - Fix: ingestion scan now trashes duplicate source files that already exist in the library (size-matched), so empty source folders are removed. Fix: added SafeFileOperations helper with cross-volume move fallback. Fix: all API clients and core services now rethrow OperationCanceledException instead of swallowing it. Fix: ingestion checkpoint resume no longer skips all files when the checkpointed source file has been moved/deleted; checkpoint is preserved on cancellation. Fix: BookGroupingService.RegisterFile is now serialized with a lock to prevent unique-constraint races. Fix: HardcoverApiClient no longer NREs on null author. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.8.7.0 - New: configurable ComicVine rate limit (requests/hour) and global API rate-limit max-wait fallback. All API clients now skip an API if the required wait exceeds the configured timeout, allowing the cascade to continue. API clients now guard against empty keys/credentials. New: in-memory ComicApiCache reduces repeated comic series/issue lookups across a batch. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.8.6.2 - Fix: scheduled tasks now guard against duplicate concurrent starts. Fix: ingestion scan log now clarifies that files are still moved/organized when online enrichment finds no match. UI: managed directory option chips returned to a horizontal row with correct checkbox/label alignment. README and Metadata Guide updated. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.8.6.1 - New: ComicIssue grouping strategy groups alternate formats of the same comic by parsed Series + Issue. New: per-managed-directory IsComicLibrary toggle; PDFs inside flagged directories are treated as comics (filename issue parsing, ComicIssue grouping, comic enrichment). Fix: standalone audiobooks no longer flagged as enrichment issues when only {Series} is missing. Fix: ComicInfo.xml with empty Series/Number now falls back to filename parsing. UI: library option checkboxes shrunk to match File Type Filters chip style. AGENTS.md updated. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.8.6.0 - New: dedicated api-responses log. All 7 API clients now write full error/exception details to plugins/BookEnhancer/api-responses/ instead of the main Jellyfin log, keeping the console clean. Parser async cleanup: ComicInfoParser, PdfParser, and AudioParser now offload sync I/O to Task.Run. Config page now shows target library collection type per managed directory and explains why library type controls home-screen sections (e.g., Latest Books vs Latest Comics). Build: 0W/0E.

v0.8.5.0 - New: enrichment cooldown logs now mention which API last enriched the file. New: per-managed-directory API selection via EnabledApiSources; each directory can override global API toggles in the Ingestion tab. Refactored MetadataEnrichmentService to use EnrichmentApiConfig. Database schema updated with EnrichedBy column. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.8.4.0 - New: series-first organization. LibraryCleanupService now detects series that span multiple authors (configurable threshold, default 2) and reorganizes them under {Series}/{Author}/{Title} instead of {Author}/{Series}/{Title}. Use case: Wheel of Time books by Robert Jordan and Brandon Sanderson stay under one The Wheel of Time parent folder. Configurable via EnableSeriesFirstOrganization (default true), SeriesFirstAuthorThreshold, and SeriesFirstTemplate. AGENTS.md updated. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.8.3.0 - Performance/resource optimization pass. Database: eliminated N+1 query in GetAllGroupsWithMultipleFormats via JOIN; SetPrimaryFormat and RegisterFile now use transactions; RegisterFile reuses a single SQLite connection for find/create/add operations instead of opening 3 connections per file. File I/O: removed materializing .ToList() in MetadataEnrichmentTask and LibraryCleanupService directory enumeration. Memory: EpubParser no longer double-buffers cover images (reads directly into byte[]). Resilience: PdfParser now catches parse failures (encrypted/malformed PDFs) and falls back to filename-based metadata instead of returning null. Allocations: optimized SanitizePathComponent to use single char-array scan. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.8.2.1 - Fix: AudioParser now uses Album/SeriesName as the canonical {BookTitle} when present, so multi-disc audiobooks tagged with Album=Brave New World and Title=1a organize under Brave New World instead of under the track name. BookTitle falls back to the cleaned title tag only when no series/album is available. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.8.2.0 - New: multi-disc audiobook organization via {BookTitle} and {Disc} template tokens. AudioParser extracts BookTitle (title with author prefix and disc marker stripped) and DiscNumber (Disc NN) from title/album tags. New: resume checkpoint service for IngestionScanTask — persists checkpoints every 10 files in plugins/BookEnhancer/checkpoints/ and resumes from the last processed file within 24 h after a service restart. Logging: BookIngestionService now summarizes moves/skips per target directory instead of logging full source/target paths for every file. README and Metadata Guide modal updated. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.8.1.0 - New: grouping strategies are now fully implemented. IsbnOnly, TitleAuthor, and Both (ISBN first, then title+author) are respected by RegisterFile, grouping scan, and grouping preview. FileNamePrefix strategy is also supported. New: {Volume} organize template token; skipped when no volume is present. New: filename volume extraction for comics (v/vol/volume/vol. prefix). Safety: duplicate detection now requires ISBN match, or comic Series+Issue+Volume+size, or non-empty Title+Author+size; non-book directory cleanup is now opt-in (default off); book_formats has unique FilePath index and ON DELETE CASCADE; AddFormatToGroup prevents duplicate paths. Fix: dead title/author branch in grouping scan removed. AGENTS.md updated. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.8.0.2 - New: per-library 'Flat Series Folders' toggle. When enabled and no custom template is set, books with a series use {Publisher}/{Series}/file.cbz or {Author}/{Series}/file.cbz, while standalone books keep their own {Publisher}/{Title}/file.cbz folder. Fix: UnifiedMetadataProvider now returns locally extracted metadata when enrichment cooldown is active instead of returning empty metadata. Fix: CBR/CB7→CBZ conversion now respects per-directory Title/Author Search setting, registers converted files in bookgroups.db, and records enrichment timestamps. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.8.0.1 - New: configurable enrichment cooldown (default 7 days) with per-file EnrichedAt tracking in bookgroups.db, preventing repeated API calls on every scheduled task run. Cooldown applied to ingestion, cleanup, metadata provider, search, scheduled enrichment, and CBR/CB7→CBZ conversion paths. New: LibraryCleanupService now registers moved files in bookgroups.db when they were not previously tracked, preserving enrichment timestamps across reorganizations. Fixed: comic filename regex now detects Series #NNN, Series_NNN, and Series NNN patterns so standalone comics move into series folders. Fixed: LibraryCleanupService no longer blocks file moves when enrichment cannot resolve all template fields. Hardened: PRAGMA table_info migration for EnrichedAt column, book_formats(FilePath) index, FileInfo.Length existence checks, and library path boundary matching. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.8.0.0 - New: Jellyfin DB fallback — FileMetadataExtractor now reads missing/null metadata fields (Title, Overview, Publisher, SeriesName, IndexNumber, ProductionYear, PremiereDate, ProviderIds, Genres) from Jellyfin's library.db when file tags are incomplete, enabling user edits in the dashboard to flow back into file tags. New: Metadata Guide modal in config page explains write-back pipeline, cascade triggers, and template tokens. Fixed: Empty catch blocks in EpubParser, PdfParser, AudioParser now log warnings instead of swallowing exceptions. Fixed: _logCallback race condition in BookIngestionService and GroupingPostProcessingService — instance field replaced with static method param pattern for thread safety. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.7.0.6 - BREAKING: TrashDirectory now required before any plugin tasks run (safety gate after 5,841 files deleted by parent-directory cleanup bug). Fixed: CleanupNonBookDirectories recursive SearchOption.AllDirectories prevents parent dirs from being classified as non-book. New: TrashDirectory with configurable auto-purge (default 7d) and creation-time validation. New: Publisher-aware default template ({Publisher}/{Series}/{Title} when publisher exists). New: CBR/CB7 to CBZ conversion + ComicInfo.xml tagging from config page (SharpCompress extraction, enrichment pipeline, trash originals). Fixed: FileMetadataWriter atomic temp-file swaps prevent data loss on crash. Fixed: Zip-slip traversal guard. Fixed: LibraryOrganizationService.MoveFile no longer permanently deletes on size-only match. Fixed: CBR→CBZ validates archive before trashing original. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.7.0.5 - Client-side per-API rate limiting via SimpleRateLimiter (sliding-window): GCD 80 req/hr, Comic Vine 180 req/hr, Metron 20 req/min, VerseDB 30 req/min, Hardcover 60 req/min, Google Books 60 req/min, OpenLibrary 100 req/min. Rate limiter static across transient instances, called before every HTTP request. Fixed: Hardcover GraphQlEndpoint → BaseUrl. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.7.0.4 - Fix: GCD CoverUrl now populated from API response (was only setting HasCover=true). Fix: GCD test button JSON key casing mismatch (Username/Password → username/password) causing test to always fail. Fix: Metron auth changed from Bearer token to HTTP Basic Auth (username/password). Logging cleanup: GrandComicsDB → GrandComicsDb. Removed 5 unused GCD DTO fields. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.7.0.3 - Grand Comics Database API integration: new GrandComicsDbApiClient searches issues by series name + issue number via GCD's issue search endpoint (GET /api/series/name/{name}/issue/{number}/). Returns creative team credits, characters, cover art, publisher, and cover date. GCD added as 4th comic cascade tier (Comic Vine -> Metron -> VerseDB -> GCD), used only when previous tiers return nothing. Config page adds GCD toggle, username, and password fields. Connectivity test covers all 7 services. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.7.0.2 - Comic filename fallback: when ComicInfo.xml is missing or unreadable (e.g. RAR5 CBRs), SeriesName, SeriesNumber, and PublishYear are parsed from common filename patterns (e.g. 'All New X-Men 014 (2013)'). Comic files no longer require an ISBN to reach the enrichment cascade — filename-parsed series+issue now triggers Comic Vine / Metron / VerseDB search. MetadataEnrichmentTask skips ISBN gate for comic formats. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.7.0.1 - Metron and VerseDB comic API integration: new MetronApiClient (community-run comic DB, searched by series+issue number, 20 req/min), new VerseDbApiClient (modern comic DB with general search). Comic enrichment cascade expanded to Comic Vine -> Metron -> VerseDB (sequential, each only if previous returns nothing). Test Enrichment Connectivity now pings all 6 services (Hardcover, Google Books, OpenLibrary, Comic Vine, Metron, VerseDB). Config page adds Metron and VerseDB toggle+token inputs. All 4 enrichment callers updated with new params. Build: 0W/0E.

v0.7.0.0 - Comic Vine API integration: new ComicVineApiClient searches single-issue comics by series+issue number, returns writer/penciller/inker/colorist/letterer/cover artist/editor/translator credits, character tags, publisher, cover date. Comic Vine added as final enrichment cascade tier (after OpenLibrary). Identify window now supports comic metadata (SeriesName/SeriesNumber) for Comic Vine searches. SceneTagCleaner strips scene release tags from fallback filenames across ingestion, library cleanup, organization, and ComicInfo parser paths. Config page adds Comic Vine toggle and API key input. Google Books link contrast fixed for dark themes.

v0.6.0.0 - Enrichment cascade overhaul: 250ms rate limiting between API calls, Google Books API key guard added, cascade now returns ApiMatchFound flag independent of HasCompleteMetadata (fixes 'No enrichment found' for files with rich local metadata). CleanupNonBookDirectories fixed to operate on LibraryPath instead of SourcePath (prevents ingestion folder deletion). 'Rich Local Metadata - Skipping enrichment' logged for files with complete metadata.

v0.5.0.0 - FullMaintenance pipeline: library cleanup -> library scan -> grouping (no longer includes ingestion). GroupingProcess now scans library directories directly instead of relying on SQLite DB (works independently of ingestion). LibraryCleanup sweeps empty directories library-wide. Config page adds Test Enrichment Connectivity button + endpoint for isolating network-level issues from API key problems. README restructured with License/alpha warning first.

v0.4.0.0 - Per-library toggles for title/author search and metadata writing. Title/author search fallback enrichment across Hardcover, Google Books, OpenLibrary. FileMetadataWriter service writes metadata to audio files (TagLibSharp), CBZ (ComicInfo.xml), and EPUB (content.opf). Cleanup now moves companion images with books, removes non-book directories, groups by library with per-library logging, and prevents duplicates by (extension, size, title, author) matching.

v0.3.0.0 - Added MetadataEnrichmentTask (reports files that cannot be enriched). Library Cleanup now skips files when enrichment cannot resolve template fields, logs them to enrichment-issues file. Added IApplicationPaths to LibraryCleanupService.
v0.2.0.3 - Added meta.json with targetAbi (fixes NotSupported on load), cleanup now enriches missing metadata before re-org.
v0.2.0.4 - Removed Microsoft.Extensions.* DLLs from plugin ZIP to fix type identity conflict (IServiceCollection) causing 'RegisterServices not implemented' error at load.

v0.2.0.2 - Added CopyLocalLockFileAssemblies to csproj so NuGet dependencies (UglyToad.PdfPig, SharpCompress, TagLibSharp, etc.) are now included in the build output and release ZIP. Fixes PdfPig missing assembly error — PDF parsing now works in deployed plugin.

v0.2.0.1 - Log files now written to Jellyfin LogDirectoryPath (visible in Dashboard Logs UI). Library Cleanup log files prefixed with 'log_' so server retention policy applies. Added retry with exponential backoff around DeleteItem for 'database is locked' errors.

v0.2.0.0 - All tasks now write exclusively to their own log files, not the main Jellyfin log. LibraryOrganizationService.MoveFile and LibraryCleanupService now route all messages through log callbacks. Remaining ILogger dependencies removed from LibraryCleanupService.

v0.1.9.9 - Tasks write operational messages to own log files instead of main Jellyfin log. IngestionScan, GroupingProcess, and FullMaintenance now route all service-level log messages through their per-task log files via log callbacks.

v0.1.9.8 - Full Grouping Preview endpoint review: fixed IsPartial never triggering for 500-file cap, ISBN normalization (strips non-digits for cross-format matching), added missing .mobi to default extensions, candidate limit (5 groups, 500 files max).
v0.1.9.7 - Grouping Preview directory enumeration wrapped in try/catch for better error resilience; error now logged at Error level with directory path.

v0.1.9.6 - Source path validation inline OK/Not found status; per-row Create directory buttons; Grouping Preview + Repair endpoints (populates JellyfinItemId, reports stale paths); loadConfig fix (config page no longer blank on load); ConfigureAwait(false) added to all awaits; TaskLogger double-dispose guard; private field naming convention fixes; == null to is null throughout.

v0.1.9.5 - Fixed FormatPriority duplication (XML serializer appending to non-empty default list); added duplicate validation and warning on config page; added GET Books/Grouping/Preview endpoint (dry-run grouping simulation); added POST Books/Grouping/Repair endpoint (cross-references book_formats against Jellyfin library items, populates JellyfinItemId column, reports stale paths); ProcessGroupAsync now stores primary item's JellyfinItemId; Repair Format Paths button on config page.

v0.1.9.4 - Added Library Cleanup scheduled task (reorganizes files to match per-source organize template, removes empty directories); FilePath database updates after moves; empty catch blocks now log warnings; removed unused BooksFileLoggerProvider.

v0.1.9.3 - Added per-source organize template (configurable folder structure via {Author}/{Series}/{Title}/{Publisher} tokens); books/audiobooks default to {Author}/{Series}/{Title}, comics default to {Publisher}/{Series}; template field in Managed Directories UI with auto-fill on library selection.
v0.1.9.2 - Fixed Hardcover API test endpoint (was using REST GET on GraphQL-only API); added ILogger to ConfigController; added 15s timeout + User-Agent header to both test endpoints.

v0.1.9.1 - Full style audit: all elements use Jellyfin CSS variables for dark/light theme compatibility; inline style fallbacks for custom classes stripped by sanitizer; compact form layout; tab active state set via JS inline; test results use theme-aware colors; hardcoded colors replaced with var(--card-background), var(--border-color), etc.

v0.1.7.0 - Managed directories connect to distinct libraries via Target Library dropdown; auto-fills LibraryPath from library location; Libraries API returns Locations; all fetch catch handlers log to console.error.
v0.1.8.0 - Fixed getJellyfinToken to handle both function and string accessToken; added config-page guard to pageshow listener; removed redundant controller registrations.

v0.1.9.0 - Fixed Dashboard.getPluginConfiguration -> ApiClient.getPluginConfiguration (caused 'not a function' crash); removed direct loadConfig() call (raced before Dashboard ready); processPluginConfigurationUpdateResult now passes result param.

v0.1.6.0 - Fixed getJellyfinToken to match Audiobookshelf auth pattern exactly; added loading-spinner CSS; added pageshow guard + document-level listener + viewshow fallback; authFetch now checks response.ok and sets Accept header.

v0.1.5.0 - Main tab (renamed from Settings, now first); Libraries unfiltered (all types); removed [Authorize] from ConfigController; fixed duplicate labels; added authFetch with Authorization header (matches Audiobookshelf pattern) for backend API calls; loading spinner on library load; reload config on pageshow.
v0.1.4.0 - Main tab (renamed from Settings, now first); Plugin Info now populates correctly; Libraries filtered to book-type only; [Authorize] on ConfigController.
v0.1.3.0 - Config page enhancements: format priority reordering, file type filters, copy/move mode, test API key buttons, plugin info & reset.
v0.1.2.0 - Triggerable scheduled tasks (Ingestion Scan, Grouping Process, Full Maintenance) with per-task log files; Full Maintenance auto-schedules via AutoScanIntervalMinutes.
v0.1.1.0 - Format grouping (single entry per title by ISBN); Managed source directories with file ingestion/moving; Format priority (EPUB > MOBI > PDF > others)
v0.1.0.0 - Alpha release. File metadata extraction (EPUB, CBZ/CBR/CB7, PDF, audio). Online enrichment via Hardcover, Google Books, OpenLibrary. Unified metadata provider.
